summary: Canonical remains open issue #73432 for the QMD embedInterval scheduling report. No close, merge, or fix action is safe in this plan: #73432 still needs a maintainer product decision on lexical search-mode embedding semantics, and #73512 is already closed plus marked security-sensitive in the preflight artifact, so it is quarantined only.

actions.reason: Best live canonical for the cluster, but it should stay open until maintainers decide whether explicit embedInterval should override the lexical search-mode contract.
Closed security-sensitive PR is historical evidence only for this cluster; route the exact ref to central OpenClaw security handling and continue treating #73432 as the non-security canonical issue.

needs_human: #73432 requires maintainer product judgment: decide whether an explicit memory.qmd.update.embedInterval should schedule QMD embedding even when searchMode is omitted/default lexical search, or whether the documented query/vsearch workaround is the intended contract.
